improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion:
<meta name="description" content="Gideon is your AI-powered trade and business assistant. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for trade operations. Try three free searches today.">
<meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Your AI Trade & Business Assistant">
<meta property="og:description" content="Meet Gideon: the Claude-powered assistant for business owners and traders. Instant AI answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access with membership.">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:image" content="https://gdn.ai/og-image.png">
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
<meta name="twitter:title" content="GDN AI – Your AI Trade & Business Assistant">
<meta name="twitter:description" content="Meet Gideon: the Claude-powered assistant for business owners and traders. Try three free searches, then unlock unlimited access.">
improvements.rationale: A compelling meta description improves click-through rates from search results by clearly communicating Gideon's value proposition. Open Graph and Twitter Card tags ensure professional, branded previews when the homepage is shared on LinkedIn, Facebook, or Twitter—critical for B2B audiences. The copy highlights key differentiators (Claude-powered, voice chat, trade focus) and includes a low-friction CTA (three free searches) without inventing claims.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for your business operations. Try three free searches — no card required."
improvements.rationale: This copy immediately communicates what Gideon is (AI assistant), who it's for (trade and business professionals), and the key value props (instant answers, voice chat, professional support). The subheading removes friction by highlighting the free trial with no commitment, which drives conversions. The copy stays within verified site context and maintains the confident, professional tone.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to choose a membership plan to continue. Plans start at just US$2 per day, billed monthly or annually—with annual billing saving you 30 percent. As a member, you'll unlock unlimited access to Gideon's AI-powered trade and business support, voice chat, and your own dedicated workspace.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses a key friction point in the conversion funnel—users wondering what happens when the free trial ends. By clearly explaining the transition, pricing options, and member benefits, it reduces uncertainty and encourages visitors to commit to a paid plan.
